caption: A man with short brown hair and a dark shirt is seen in a small video overlay in the lower-left corner of a screen displaying the "ITEM MANAGER" interface of a sports video game. The interface features a dark purple background with various menu options such as "MY ITEMS," "SETS," and "AUCTION HOUSE," with "AUCTION HOUSE" currently selected. The screen shows a list of football player cards for sale, some marked as "CLOSED." Various filters are listed on the left, including "TYPE," "QUALITY," "TEAM," "PROGRAM," and "CHEMISTRY." At the top right, currency and level indicators are visible, such as "LV 19." Across the sequence, the man's facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, while the overall game screen remains static, maintaining the same layout of player cards, prices, and navigation menus throughout the clip.
